alert.title: Alerts & Reminders
alert.messageTemplateWarning:
Dear Partner,

We noticed that the order related to "{{title}}" has an issue that needs attention.

{{message}}

Please confirm and respond as soon as possible.

Best regards,
TECHLA AI COMPANY LIMITED
alert.messageTemplateDefault:
Dear Partner,

This is a notification regarding: {{title}}.

{{message}}

Please contact us if you need further assistance.

Best regards,
TECHLA AI COMPANY LIMITED

zalo.title: Zalo Integration
zalo.webhookGuide: Copy this URL and paste it into the Webhook section on Func.vn. Select Auth Type: None, check message events.
zalo.accountTokenHint: Get from Accounts → Settings page on Func.vn
zalo.functionUrlHint: URL of Function API created on Func.vn (used for sending messages)
zalo.syncHint: Import message history from Func.vn to CRM
zalo.selectConversation: Select a conversation to view messages
zalo.syncBanner: AI analyzes based on synced messages in DB. Click "Sync" to update the latest messages from Zalo.
zalo.newOrdersQuestion: Any messages ordering or asking about products?
zalo.needsReplyQuestion: Which customer messages haven't been replied and need urgent response?
zalo.analyzeQuestion: Analyze trends: which products are customers most interested in?
zalo.aiConnectionError: AI connection error. Please try again.
zalo.trainDescription: Add knowledge to make AI smarter.
zalo.trainingHelpText: Enter knowledge for AI. Example: "5L bottle means HDPE 5L can", "Wholesale price from 500 units"...
zalo.syncSuccess: Sync done: {{synced}} new messages, {{skipped}} already synced
zalo.noKnowledge: No knowledge yet. Add to make AI smarter!
zalo.autoReplyPromptPlaceholder: e.g. You are a PackFlow assistant. Reply politely and concisely about plastic packaging products. If unsure, suggest the customer chat with a staff member.
zalo.autoReplyHint: When enabled, AI will auto-reply to incoming messages. You can toggle per-thread in the Messages tab.

chatbot.welcome:
Hello! I'm Aura — your AI assistant.

I can help you look up:
• Orders, receivables / payables
• Customer, supplier info
• Revenue, profit, cash book
• Products, inventory

What can I help you with?

role.title: Roles & permissions
role.subtitle: Configure roles and fine-grained permissions for each user group.
role.deleteConfirm: Delete this role? Users with this role must be reassigned.
role.selectRoleHint: Select a role to view its permissions
role.slugHelp: Unique identifier, no spaces — e.g. sales_manager
role.name: Name
role.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe what this role is responsible for
role.adminReadOnly: Admin always has full permissions and cannot be edited.
role.selfEditWarning: You just edited your own role — please sign out and sign in again to refresh your permissions.

search.placeholder: Search permissions by name, key, or description...

emptyState.chooseRole: Pick a role from the left to view and edit its permissions

roleDescriptions.manager: Manage everything (excluding users, roles, audit log)

admin.heroDescription: The Administrator role always has full system access. It cannot be edited to prevent accidentally locking out admin accounts.
